meaning: n.情操,情感,情绪,观点,多愁善感,感情
examples: With the last sentiment, Arnold was in hearty agreement.
He has illustrated this sentiment thoroughly in a drama.
At the next election none of the big parties seem likely to endorse this sentiment.
Sentiment remains grumpy and cautious, and as a value-oriented investor I am thankful for this, too.
None of this will amount to a hill of beans except to swing sentiment and incite panic.
